Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is granted, no opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. Order and Consent Judgment signed. Judge Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/SB)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Continued To Jun-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is continued to June 26, 2015, at 9;30 a.m., in Dept. 302, per agreement of the parties. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF AS YOU SOW'S Motion To Enter Consent Judgment is continued on the Court's motion to June 17, 2015 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 to be heard by Judge Goldsmith. Judge Kahn, who is handling the Law and Motion calendar on June 15, 2015, has recused himself in this case due to his friendship with Plaintiff's counsel. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR # 7489 =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Consent Judgment

Judge Kahn, who is handling the law and motion calendar on June 3, has recused himself in this case due to his friendship with plaintiff's counsel. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/HK)
